---
title: atmos vendor get
sidebar_label: get
sidebar_class_name: command
id: vendor-get
description: Read the pinned version of a vendored component from vendor.yaml.
---
import Intro from '@site/src/components/Intro'
import Screengrab from '@site/src/components/Screengrab'

<Intro>
Read the version pinned for a component in your `vendor.yaml` manifest. The component
is matched by name, so manifest ordering does not matter.
</Intro>

<Screengrab title="atmos vendor get --help" slug="atmos-vendor-get--help" />

## Usage

```shell
atmos vendor get <component> [--file <manifest>]
```

## Examples

```shell
atmos vendor get vpc
atmos vendor get vpc --file ./vendor.yaml
```

## Arguments

<dl>
  <dt>`<component>` (required)</dt>
  <dd>The component name as it appears in `spec.sources[].component`.</dd>
</dl>

## Flags

<dl>
  <dt>`--file` (string, default `./vendor.yaml`)</dt>
  <dd>The vendor manifest file to read.</dd>
</dl>
